heading: Director
label: 4512 Director

children.heading: Establishment of position
children.label: a Establishment of position
children.text: There is established the position of the Director of the Agency, who shall be the head of the Agency.

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: 1 Appointment
children.text: The Director shall be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, from among individuals who are citizens of the United States, have a demonstrated understanding of financial management or oversight, and have a demonstrated understanding of capital markets, including the mortgage securities markets and housing finance.

children.heading: Term
children.label: 2 Term
children.text: The Director shall be appointed for a term of 5 years, unless removed before the end of such term for cause by the President.

children.heading: Vacancy
children.label: 3 Vacancy
children.text: A vacancy in the position of Director that occurs before the expiration of the term for which a Director was appointed shall be filled in the manner established under paragraph (1), and the Director appointed to fill such vacancy shall be appointed only for the remainder of such term.

children.heading: Service after end of term
children.label: 4 Service after end of term
children.text: An individual may serve as the Director after the expiration of the term for which appointed until a successor has been appointed.

children.heading: Transitional provision
children.label: 5 Transitional provision
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraphs (1) and (2), during the period beginning on the effective date of the Federal Housing Finance Regulatory Reform Act of 2008, and ending on the date on which the Director is appointed and confirmed, the person serving as the Director of the Office of Federal Housing Enterprise Oversight of the Department of Housing and Urban Development on that effective date shall act for all purposes as, and with the full powers of, the Director.

children.heading: Deputy Director of the Division of Enterprise Regulation
children.label: c Deputy Director of the Division of Enterprise Regulation

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Agency shall have a Deputy Director of the Division of Enterprise Regulation, who shall be designated by the Director from among individuals who are citizens of the United States, have a demonstrated understanding of financial management or oversight, and have a demonstrated understanding of mortgage securities markets and housing finance.

children.heading: Functions
children.label: 2 Functions
children.text: The Deputy Director of the Division of Enterprise Regulation shall have such functions, powers, and duties with respect to the oversight of the enterprises as the Director shall prescribe.

children.heading: Deputy Director of the Division of Federal Home Loan Bank Regulation
children.label: d Deputy Director of the Division of Federal Home Loan Bank Regulation

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Agency shall have a Deputy Director of the Division of Federal Home Loan Bank Regulation, who shall be designated by the Director from among individuals who are citizens of the United States, have a demonstrated understanding of financial management or oversight, and have a demonstrated understanding of the Federal Home Loan Bank System and housing finance.

children.heading: Functions
children.label: 2 Functions
children.text: The Deputy Director of the Division of Federal Home Loan Bank Regulation shall have such functions, powers, and duties with respect to the oversight of the Federal Home Loan Banks as the Director shall prescribe.

children.heading: Deputy Director for Housing Mission and Goals
children.label: e Deputy Director for Housing Mission and Goals

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Agency shall have a Deputy Director for Housing Mission and Goals, who shall be designated by the Director from among individuals who are citizens of the United States, and have a demonstrated understanding of the housing markets and housing finance.

children.heading: Functions
children.label: 2 Functions
children.text: The Deputy Director for Housing Mission and Goals shall have such functions, powers, and duties with respect to the oversight of the housing mission and goals of the enterprises, and with respect to oversight of the housing finance and community and economic development mission of the Federal Home Loan Banks, as the Director shall prescribe.

children.heading: Considerations
children.label: 3 Considerations
children.text: In exercising such functions, powers, and duties, the Deputy Director for Housing Mission and Goals shall consider the differences between the enterprises and the Federal Home Loan Banks, including those described in .section 4513(d) of this title

children.heading: Acting Director
children.label: f Acting Director
children.text: In the event of the death, resignation, sickness, or absence of the Director, the President shall designate either the Deputy Director of the Division of Enterprise Regulation, the Deputy Director of the Division of Federal Home Loan Bank Regulation, or the Deputy Director for Housing Mission and Goals, to serve as acting Director until the return of the Director, or the appointment of a successor pursuant to subsection (b).
have any direct or indirect financial interest in any regulated entity or entity-affiliated party;
hold any office, position, or employment in any regulated entity or entity-affiliated party; or

have served as an executive officer or director of any regulated entity or entity-affiliated party at any time during the 3-year period preceding the date of appointment or designation of such individual as Director or Deputy Director, as applicable.
